chapter_title.ar: باب صَلَاةِ فَاطِمَةَ ( عليها السلام ) وَ غَيْرِهَا مِنْ صَلَاةِ التَّرْغِيبِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 92 – Salāt of Syeda Fatima<sup>asws</sup>, and others from the Salāt of exhortation

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/448)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/448)
text: مَنْ صَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ بِقُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ فِي كُلِّ رَكْعَةٍ سِتِّينَ مَرَّةً انْفَتَلَ وَ لَيْسَ بَيْنَهُ وَ بَيْنَ اللَّهِ ذَنْبٌ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, by  his chain,

(It has been) raising it from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The one who prays four Rak’at of Salāt with [112:1] Say He Allah is One (Chapter 112) sixty times in every Rak’at, would wrap up (finish), and there would not be a sin (remaining) between him and Allahazwj’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from through the chain of his narrators in a marfu’ manner who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the text is the same as the previous Hadith except that it says, ‘Read Chapter 112 of the Holy Quran sixty times in each Rak‘at.’”
